arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the Glue connection.

catalog_id.description: The ID of the Data Catalog in which the connection resides.

connection_type.description: The type of the Glue connection (e.g., JDBC, S3, etc.).

description.description: A description of the Glue connection.

match_criteria.description: A list of criteria to match when using the connection.

name.description: The name of the Glue connection.

physical_connection_requirements.description: The physical network requirements for the Glue connection, including availability zone, security group IDs, and subnet ID.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the Glue connection.
